name: Egg Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ground beef in a skillet, draining all grease and excess water.
2. Mix the cooked ground beef with chopped onions, celery, soy sauce, brown sugar, salt, and pepper in a 5-quart pan.
3. Simmer the mixture for about 5 minutes.
4. Take a small amount of the mixture (about 1/4 cup) and place it at one corner of an egg roll shell.
5. Roll the shell through the middle and fold over the opposite corners, continuing to roll until you reach the end of the roll.
6. Wet your finger with water and gently press on the open end of the shell to seal it closed.
7. Deep fry the rolls at medium heat until they are golden brown.
(Ground beef can be substituted with another meat of your choice.)
